query: SELECT odooCompanyId, docType, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM company_documents GROUP BY odooCompanyId, docType HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user WXqa14W8mSgTfpb.99f8bb228633 --database X5tJK2uaPFqt5EwqucHsfz --execute SELECT odooCompanyId, docType, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM company_documents GROUP BY odooCompanyId, docType HAVING cnt > 1;
